Build a content-addressed helper over a D82 KV tier.

## Import

```ts
import { contentAddressedKv } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

## Signature

```ts
function contentAddressedKv(opts: ContentAddressedKvOptions<Ctx, V>): ContentAddressedKv<Ctx, V>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `opts` | `ContentAddressedKvOptions<Ctx, V>` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `ContentAddressedKv<Ctx, V>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { contentAddressedKv } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```
